Operation 'createWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is identical to summary and provides no actionable information. Missing critical details about what webhooks do (receive event notifications), required inputs (URL, event types), expected outputs (webhook ID, status), and side effects (webhook becomes active). Added domain context about event types and authentication to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.summary_suggestion: Create and register a new webhook endpoint
data.description_suggestion: Creates and registers a new webhook to receive event notifications from Yoco. Requires authentication. The webhook URL will receive POST requests when specified events occur (e.g., payment completed, refund processed). Request body must include the webhook URL and event types to subscribe to. Returns the created webhook object with a unique webhook ID and status. The webhook will be in 'active' status upon creation and ready to receive events.
data.reasoning: Original description is identical to summary and provides no actionable information. Missing critical details about what webhooks do (receive event notifications), required inputs (URL, event types), expected outputs (webhook ID, status), and side effects (webhook becomes active). Added domain context about event types and authentication to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'deleteWebhook' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is identical to summary and lacks essential details. Missing information about the required webhook-id parameter, authentication requirement, what happens after deletion (stops receiving events), return value, and permanence of the action. Enhanced with parameter details, side effects (permanent removal, stops receiving notifications), and return behavior to enable AI agents to understand the operation's consequences.

data.summary_suggestion: Delete a registered webhook by ID
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a registered webhook by its unique webhook ID. Requires authentication and the webhook ID as a path parameter. Once deleted, the webhook will no longer receive event notifications from Yoco. Returns a success response (typically 204 No Content or 200 OK with confirmation). This action is permanent and cannot be undone - the webhook will be removed from the system immediately.
data.reasoning: Original description is identical to summary and lacks essential details. Missing information about the required webhook-id parameter, authentication requirement, what happens after deletion (stops receiving events), return value, and permanence of the action. Enhanced with parameter details, side effects (permanent removal, stops receiving notifications), and return behavior to enable AI agents to understand the operation's consequences.

data.summary_suggestion: Initiate OAuth authorization flow
data.description_suggestion: Initiates the OAuth 2.0 authorization flow for user authentication. Accepts client_id, redirect_uri, and scope parameters to request user authorization. Redirects to the authorization consent screen where the user can approve or deny access. Upon approval, redirects to the specified redirect_uri with an authorization code that can be exchanged for an access token via the /token endpoint.
